sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56969" key="keu/qhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κεύθ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n56969.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀπόκρυψις</ref></xr>, as etym. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κύησις</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:43" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.43</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
